    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractSwingView
     
    AgressivePlayerStrategy
    In AgressivePlayerStrategy, the data flow into model object and updates the view whenever data changes.
    BenevolentPlayerStrategy
    In BenevolentPlayerStrategy, the data flow into model object and updates the view whenever data changes.
    CardModel
     
    CheaterPlayerStrategy
    In CheaterPlayerStrategy, the data flow into model object and updates the view whenever data changes.
    ConnectCountryController
    In ConnectCountryController, the data flow into model object and updates the view whenever data changes.
    Constant
    Constant file to load the map fie
    ContinentsModel
    "ContinentsModel" is a class for continents of the map.
    CountryModel
    "CountryModel" represents a country's properties such as name, position, continent name that it belongs to, countries that it connected to, owner (player who owns it) name, Number of armies in, and color.
    CreateContinentController
    In CreateContinentController, the data flow into model object and updates the view whenever data changes.
    CreateCountryController
    In CreateCountryController, the data flow into model object and updates the view whenever data changes.
    CreateMapModel
    "CreateMapModel" represents Map Model as an object Properties are: continents array, countries array, and links like continent-country and country-country.
    EditContinentController
    In EditContinentController, the data flow into model object and updates the view whenever data changes.
    Environment
     
    GameMapModel
    Model of whole map file that gets generated in the end
    GameModeController
    In GameModeController, the data flow into model object and updates the view whenever data changes.
    GamePlayController
    In GamePlayController, the data flow into model object and updates the view whenever data changes.
    GamePlayModel
    "GamePlayerModel" class represents an object containing current map and players.
    HumanPlayerStrategy
    In HumanPlayerStrategy, the data flow into model object and updates the view whenever data changes.
    IAttackView
     
    IConnectCountryView
     
    ICreateContinentView
     
    ICreateCountryView
     
    IEditContinentView
     
    IFortificationView
     
    IGameModeView
     
    INewGameView
     
    IReinforcementView
     
    IStartUpView
     
    ITournamentDetailView
     
    IView
    Rule to build a view
    IViewManager
     
    IWelcomeScreenView
     
    MapButton
    "MapButton" class gives the positioning of the country.
    MessageUtil
    This class prints the given message on console.
    NewGameController
    In NewGameController, the data flow into model object and updates the view whenever data changes.
    PlayConsoleView
     
    PlayerController
    In PlayerController, the data flow into model object and updates the view whenever data changes.
    PlayerModel
    "PlayerModel" class represents an object of a player.
    RandomPlayerStrategy
     
    ReadFile
    "ReadFile" class reads map file and gives continents and countries details
    SaveGame
     
    Start
     
    StartupController
    In StartUpController, the data flow into model object and updates the view whenever data changes.
    StartUpTournamentController
     
    Strategy
     
    SwingAttackView
    This View provides the attackView of the Game Play.
    SwingConnectCountryView
    "SwingConnectCountryView" Class displays a view to enable the players to connect a country to any other one during map creation.
    SwingCreateContinentView
    "SwingCreateContinentView" class represents a view object for creating continent Properties are containing labels, text fields, buttons, a pane, and a panel
    SwingCreateCountryView
    "SwingCreateCountryView" class represents a view object for creating a country view Properties are containing labels, text fields, buttons, combo-boxes, a pane, and a panel.
    SwingEditContinentView
    "SwingEditContinentView" represents a view object for editing a continent It contains Labels, text fields, and buttons
    SwingFortificationView
    "SwingFortificationView" class represents a view object of fortification phase.
    SwingGameModeView
    The Class SwingGameModeView
    SwingNewGameView
    The Class SwingNewGameView
    SwingReinforcementView
    This View provides the reinforcementView of the Game Play.
    SwingStartUpView
    This class file is the view (observer) for Start Up Phase of Game Play
    SwingTournamentDetailView
    The Class SwingGameModeView
    SwingViewManager
     
    SwingWelcomeScreenView
    This is the Welcome Screen of the game.
    TournamentModel
     
    TournmentDetailController
     
    Validation
    This class is to valdiate map for its correctness.
    View
    Rule to build a view
    ViewActionEvent
     
    ViewActionListener
     
    ViewListSelectionEvent
     
    ViewListSelectionListener
     
    WelcomeScreenController
    "WelcomeScreenController" is the main class.
    WriteMap
    This Class has validation, creation and writing to map file
